tasks.subject: Task 0: Repo scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the new git repo with the base folder structure and adapted stylesheet.

**Files:**
- Create: `D:\Work\github\iguanaman\gamebook\` (git repo)
- Create: `style.css`
- Create: `index.html`
- Create: `engine.js`
- Create: `.gitignore`
- Create: `stories/.gitkeep`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] git init done, initial commit exists
- [ ] index.html opens in browser without errors
- [ ] style.css loaded, dark theme visible
- [ ] Folder structure matches spec

```json:metadata
{"files": ["style.css", "index.html", "engine.js", ".gitignore", "stories/.gitkeep"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["git init done", "index.html opens without errors", "dark theme visible"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Story selector screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render a story selection screen listing available stories from a manifest.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `style.css`
- Create: `stories/manifest.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] manifest.json lists story IDs
- [ ] Each card shows title, description, cover
- [ ] Play vs Continue button based on saved state
- [ ] New Game clears save after confirm

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js", "style.css", "stories/manifest.json"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html, verify selector renders", "acceptanceCriteria": ["selector renders with no-stories message", "cards load story metadata", "play/continue logic works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: State management
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement state module — load, save, clear, undo — with LocalStorage persistence.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] initState creates fresh state
- [ ] saveState persists to LocalStorage
- [ ] loadState restores from LocalStorage
- [ ] pushHistory snapshots before each transition
- [ ] undo restores previous state

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual: navigate scenes, reload page, verify state persists", "acceptanceCriteria": ["state persists across reload", "undo restores previous scene and stats"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Scene loading and rendering
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load scene JSON on demand and render narrative, stats HUD, and choices.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] startStory loads story.json and navigates to start scene
- [ ] navigateTo fetches scene JSON and renders it
- [ ] Stats HUD shows current values
- [ ] Choices hidden if requires not met
- [ ] Dead-end shows The End

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "manual: play through scenes, verify rendering", "acceptanceCriteria": ["narrative renders", "choices render", "conditional choices hidden", "dead-end shows The End"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Audio playback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Play pre-generated narration audio on scene load, stop previous on navigation.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Scene with audio field plays on navigation
- [ ] Previous audio stops on navigation
- [ ] Missing audio field plays nothing

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual: add test mp3, verify plays on scene load", "acceptanceCriteria": ["audio plays on scene load", "audio stops on navigation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Demo story
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Author a minimal demo story (5 scenes) to verify full engine end-to-end.

**Files:**
- Create: `stories/demo/story.json`
- Create: `stories/demo/scenes/start.json`
- Create: `stories/demo/scenes/start_with_lantern.json`
- Create: `stories/demo/scenes/path_a.json`
- Create: `stories/demo/scenes/path_b.json`
- Create: `stories/demo/scenes/end.json`
- Modify: `stories/manifest.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Demo appears on selector
- [ ] All scenes navigable
- [ ] Conditional choice works
- [ ] Stat change works
- [ ] Undo works
- [ ] Save persists across reload

```json:metadata
{"files": ["stories/demo/story.json", "stories/manifest.json"], "verifyCommand": "manual: play through demo story fully", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all scenes reachable", "conditional choice hidden until lantern bought", "gold decreases correctly", "undo restores stats", "reload resumes at same scene"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Polish and CSS variables
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ensure stylesheet has correct CSS variables and layout looks clean with demo story.

**Files:**
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All CSS variables referenced by engine styles are defined
- [ ] Dark theme clean
- [ ] Narrative readable, choices tappable

```json:metadata
{"files": ["style.css"], "verifyCommand": "manual: visual review with demo story", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no missing CSS variable errors", "layout looks clean"]}
```
